default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Tribe AI and GrowthX to review content strategy performance and discuss improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current content strategy underperforming (5 clicks, 857 impressions after 20/30 articles indexed)](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Significant misalignment on competitors, topics, and overall strategy focus](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Jaclyn to provide direct input on relevant topics, competitors, and personas](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [GrowthX to revamp strategy, leveraging new V2 workflow with improved research and formatting](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Review

  - [20 out of 30 articles indexed and crawled](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Current performance: 5 clicks, 857 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Underperforming expectations; aiming to accelerate click accumulation](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [SEO impact typically takes up to 2 months to show significant results](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Three-pronged approach: existing keywords analysis, ICP-focused content templates, competitor research](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Strategy aims to cover AI consulting for various industries (finance, healthcare) and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Jaclyn noted many topics feel random and disconnected from regular conversations](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Competitor Analysis Issues

  - [Significant discrepancies in competitor list; \~90% deemed irrelevant by Jaclyn](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Example: "sriya.ai" flagged as an unknown, potentially spam-like inclusion](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [GrowthX to completely redo competitor research](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)

### Persona and Industry Refinement

  - [Addition of "product leaders" (CPO, VP Product) to persona list](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Jaclyn to review and provide feedback on industries and personas](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### Content Quality and Relevance

  - [Some topics identified as incomplete or grammatically incorrect](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Jaclyn to provide comments on fringe topics and share ideas based on actual client conversations](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes combining client insights with SEO research for better results](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)

### New Workflow Implementation (V2)

  - [Improved formatting: more bullet points, skimmable sections for better UX](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Enhanced research depth: leveraging Google and other sources for fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Significantly better content quality based on tests with other clients](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jaclyn to review and comment on existing topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Jaclyn to send additional content ideas and topics based on actual client conversations](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [GrowthX to create a brand new strategy incorporating Jaclyn's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Implement V2 workflow for upcoming content creation](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Schedule consistent meetings with Jaclyn or Noah for direct insights](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [GrowthX to redo competitor research and refine persona/industry lists](https://fathom.video/share/a2Uw_556McJ7hJBftEyy83cS_yo_Er8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)

action_items.description: Review Airtable - add/remove competitors, comment on topics, provide feedback on industries and personas
Redo competitor research, removing irrelevant entries (e.g. sriya.ai)
Send download of additional content ideas and topics to team
Create new content strategy incorporating Jaclyn's feedback and new topic ideas
